name: Advanced Diagnosis Phase 8 - Specialty Guided Modules
new_features: guided modules for fever, headache, cough/chest, GI/abdomen, urinary/kidney, female complaints, child/pediatric, skin and chronic constitutional cases
module-specific red flags and focused questions
quick finding chips that add structured findings to the case
specialty module notes are appended to analysis text and saved in ADX records
loaded ADX records restore specialty module notes
final summary includes specialty module section
note: Specialty modules are structured checklists to reduce missed questions; they do not replace clinical examination.
